imagePrompt: Bold stacked typography reading OVERTHINKING IS MY CARDIO in four chunky lines, dark navy outline, sage and coral fills alternating by line, tiny brain icons flanking the text, transparent background. Crisp bold linework, no photorealism.
printReadyPrompt: Flat vector artwork with crisp chunky typography. Stroke weight ~2-3px in dark navy around filled shapes. Palette: sage green (#98AFA9), dusty coral (#E07A5F), bright accents in neon yellow (#FFD300). Transparent background.
